homepage_teaser_body: Three coaches. Three nights a week. From two-year-olds on balance bikes to Olympians refining their craft.
bottom_cta_body: Check out our FAQ for answers about coaching costs, what to bring, racing licences and more.

coaches.bio:
Dane Van Laeren is a current Elite BMX Racer with 10+ years of racing experience and 7+ years of coaching experience, working with the best coaches in Australia.
Currently the Victorian development squad coach, the in-depth knowledge and alternative ways of thinking generate some of the best riders in the country! Working from beginners to world level athletes, Dane can identify exactly what each rider needs in order to achieve their best out on the track.
coaches.name: Dane

coaches.bio: Get your little ones pedalling with the best. Coach Connor Fallon is a former National Series Champion and passionate about introducing the joy of BMX to riders of all ages and skill levels — from balance bikes for our youngest two-year-olds to helping kids master their first pedals. Connor provides a fun and supportive environment, whether you're looking for a solid foundation in BMX fundamentals or want to hone your racing skills.
coaches.name: Connor Fallon
coaches.tagline: From balance bikes to first pedals

coaches.bio: Get ready to learn from a true legend. Bodi Turner is a lifelong Eagles Nest member and one of Australia's top riders since his teenage years — now bringing his exceptional racing skills and expertise to you. With over 25 years of experience, Bodi provides unparalleled coaching for kids and advanced riders of all ages. Experience the difference an Olympian's insight can make and elevate your riding to new heights.
coaches.name: Bodi Turner

intro_body:
Whether you're just starting out or aiming to dominate the track, our coaching programs are designed to help you reach your full BMX potential. Learn essential skills, refine your technique, and build confidence with expert guidance from experienced coaches.

Regular coaching is the key to unlocking new skills, improving your race strategy and staying safe while having fun. Join us at the Eagles Nest and discover the thrill of continuous improvement.
